column1: # Sample EcoWitt-shaped sensor readings for Verdant CSV import.
# `source` is the transport/origin Verdant validates. Here readings come
# directly from an EcoWitt gateway → `source = ecowitt`.
# If the same readings arrived via an MQTT broker bridging EcoWitt data
# Vendor is lineage only — never used for auth
# captured_at uses ISO 8601 with timezone. Lines beginning with `#` are
# comments and should be stripped before ingest.
